The infiltration went smoothly, even though his eyes lingered on what he could carry off.

Sentinel: Infiltration validated. Note: unauthorized detour for material collection, no negative impact on the outcome.

Zone penetrated. I recommend oversight of collecting behavior in infiltrated zones.

Okay maybe I took a little detour for some loot. But look, it paid off!
I couldn't leave that there. And in the end, it didn't compromise our discretion. Double win.
I grabbed what I could on the way. Priorities, right.

Zone not penetrated. I note that prioritizing resources affected the time available to stay discreet.
